_comment: Article pipeline queue. Each article advances through stages defined in config.json. Human review stages (outline_review, draft_review, final_review) require manual stage advancement. To advance: change stage from *_review to *_approved and save.

articles.title: Where Vibe Coding Breaks Down: A Governance Framework for Software in Manufacturing
articles.notes: Research complete 2026-05-10. 12 sources, key stats on governance gap (73%), AI code flaws (45%), shadow IT (42%), OT ransomware (+46%). Ready for outline.

articles.title: "Human in the Loop" Is Not a Safety Strategy
